name: CdcAppUpdt

sqlReaderQuery.value: UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FctsCdcOwner}.@{pipeline().parameters.CdcTableNm} SET APP1 = 'P' WHERE APP1 = 'E'; SELECT 1 AS ONE

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2022 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

CALLED BY:  Multiple Sequencers

PROCESSING:   Update CDC tables to mark processed records complete.   Change records where APP1 = E to P

Update CDC table setting DataStage batched records (APP1 = E) to processed (APP1 = P)
